PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Jun-15-2022 Continued To Jul-13-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Joseph Doherty, via Zoom, specially appearing for Paul Kozel, Petitioner.

Counsel reports that he is working with the Petitioner and his current attorney to substitute-in as attorney for the Petitioner. Counsel advises that a new will might exist and that a search has begun for the new will and if it is found, the instant petition will be dropped. The court advises of the issues with the current attorney not responding to the Examiner's notes. The court advises that it will be issuing an order to appear to the attorney of record which may be moot if the Substitution of Attorney is filed.

The matter is continued to Jul-13-2022 at 9:00 am. An Order to Appear will be issued to Attorney Elizabeth Barsell to appear on the same date to explain why she failed to appear and for failure to address the Examiner's notes.

Judge: Hon. Joseph Quinn. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Martinez. Not Reported.
